title: Crispy Fresh Lettuce Stir-fry
description: This refreshing and easy-to-make dish is perfect for a lazy Sunday in the kitchen. It features crispy baby lettuce leaves that are stir-fried with fresh vegetables, creating a vibrant and satisfying plant-based meal.

ingredients.name: Baby Lettuce Leaves
ingredients.notes: Wash thoroughly to remove any dirt.

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce or Tamari (for non-vegan option)

instructions: Wash the baby lettuce leaves thoroughly, pat dry with paper towels.
Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Add minced garlic and chili flakes if using.
Once the garlic is fragrant, add the washed and dried lettuce leaves to the pan. Fry for about 2-3 minutes per side, turning occasionally, until crispy on all sides.
Add salt and pepper to taste, then sprinkle with fresh herbs before serving.
Optional: For a non-vegan dish, stir in soy sauce or tamari during the last minute of cooking.
